For the Lord God of Hosts shall make a Dan. 9:27.consumption, even determined in all the land.

Therefore, thus saith the Lord God of Hosts: O my people that dwellest in Zion, Isa. 37:6 (6–7).be not afraid of the Assyrian; he shall smite thee with a rod, and shall lift up his staff against thee, after the TG Israel, Bondage of, in Egypt; Israel, Bondage of, in Other Lands.manner of Egypt.
For yet a very little while, and the Isa. 10:25; Dan. 11:36.indignation shall cease, and mine anger in their destruction.

And the Lord of Hosts shall 2 Kgs. 19:35.stir up a scourge for him according to the slaughter of Gen. 25:2 (1–6); Judg. 7:25; Isa. 9:4.Midian at the rock of Oreb; and as his rod was upon the sea so shall he lift it up after the manner of Ex. 14:27 (26–27).Egypt.

And it shall come to pass in that day that his Isa. 14:25.burden shall be taken away from off thy shoulder, and his yoke from off thy neck, and the yoke shall be destroyed because of the TG Jesus Christ, Messiah.anointing.
IE The Assyrian invasion forces introduced in v. 5 progress toward Jerusalem, vv. 28–32.He is come to Aiath, he is passed to Migron; at Michmash he hath laid up his carriages.
They are gone over the 1 Sam. 13:23.passage; they have taken up their lodging at Neh. 11:31.Geba; Ramath is afraid; 1 Sam. 11:4.Gibeah of Saul is fled.
Lift up the voice, O daughter of 1 Sam. 25:44.Gallim; cause it to be heard unto Laish, O poor Josh. 21:18.Anathoth.
Madmenah is removed; the inhabitants of Gebim gather themselves to flee.
As yet shall he remain at 1 Sam. 21:1; 22:19; Neh. 11:32.Nob that day; he shall shake his hand against the mount of the daughter of Zion, the hill of Jerusalem.

Behold, the Lord, the Lord of Hosts shall lop the bough with terror; and the Obad. 1:3 (3–4); Hel. 4:12 (12–13); D&C 101:42.high ones of stature shall be Ezek. 17:24; Amos 2:9; D&C 112:8 (3–8).hewn down; and the Ps. 18:27; 3 Ne. 25:1; D&C 29:9.haughty shall be humbled.
And he shall cut down the thickets of the forests with iron, and Lebanon shall fall by a mighty one.

div.p: The stem of Jesse (Christ) will judge in righteousness—The knowledge of God will cover the earth in the Millennium—The Lord will raise an ensign and gather Israel—Compare Isaiah 11. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: Isa. 11:1 (1–16).And there shall Isa. 53:2; Rev. 5:5.come forth a rod out of the D&C 113:2 (1–2).stem of Jesse, and a TG Jesus Christ, Davidic Descent of.branch shall grow out of his roots.

And the Isa. 61:1 (1–3).Spirit of the Lord shall rest upon him, the spirit of 1 Kgs. 3:28.wisdom and 1 Kgs. 3:11 (10–11).understanding, the spirit of counsel and might, the spirit of knowledge and of the fear of the Lord;
And shall make him of quick understanding in the fear of the Lord; and he shall not 2 Ne. 12:4.judge after the sight of his eyes, neither reprove after the hearing of his ears.

But with Ps. 50:6; Mosiah 29:12.righteousness shall he Ps. 72:4 (2–4). TG Jesus Christ, Judge.judge the poor, and reprove with equity for the TG Meek.meek of the earth; and he shall Ps. 2:9.smite the earth with the 2 Thes. 2:8; Rev. 19:15.rod of his mouth, and with the breath of his lips shall he slay the wicked.
And TG Jesus Christ, Millennial Reign.righteousness shall be the girdle of his loins, and faithfulness the girdle of his reins.
The Isa. 65:25.wolf also shall dwell with the lamb, and the leopard shall lie down with the kid, and the calf and the young lion and fatling together; and a little child shall lead them.
And the cow and the bear shall feed; their young ones shall lie down together; and the lion shall eat straw like the ox.
And the sucking child shall play on the hole of the asp, and the weaned child shall put his hand on the cockatrice’s den.

They shall Isa. 2:4.not hurt nor TG War.destroy in all my holy mountain, for the Hab. 2:14.earth shall be full of the Ps. 66:4; D&C 88:104. TG Knowledge; Millennium.knowledge of the Lord, as the waters cover the sea.

And in that day there shall be a Rom. 15:12; D&C 113:5 (5–6).root of Jesse, which shall stand for an ensign of the people; to it shall the D&C 45:9 (9–10).Gentiles seek; and his D&C 19:9. TG Earth, Renewal of.rest shall be glorious.

And it shall come to pass in that day that the Lord shall set his hand again the 2 Ne. 6:14; 25:17; 29:1.second time to recover the remnant of his people which shall be left, from Zech. 10:10.Assyria, and from Egypt, and from Pathros, and from Cush, and from Elam, and from Gen. 10:10.Shinar, and from Hamath, and from the islands of the sea.

And he shall set up an TG Ensign.ensign for the nations, and shall assemble the 3 Ne. 15:15; 16:1 (1–4).outcasts of Israel, and Neh. 1:9; 1 Ne. 22:12 (10–12); D&C 45:25 (24–25). TG Israel, Gathering of.gather together the dispersed of Judah from the four corners of the earth.

The Jer. 3:18.envy of Ephraim also shall depart, and the adversaries of Judah shall be cut off; Ephraim shall not Ezek. 37:22 (16–22). TG Envy.envy TG Israel, Joseph, People of; Israel, Judah, People of.Judah, and Judah shall not vex Ephraim.

But they shall fly upon the shoulders of the Obad. 1:19 (18–19).Philistines towards the west; they shall spoil them of the east together; they shall lay their hand upon Lam. 4:21.Edom and Gen. 19:37 (30–38).Moab; and the children of Ammon shall obey them.

And the Lord shall utterly Zech. 10:11.destroy the tongue of the Egyptian sea; and with his mighty wind he shall shake his hand over the river, and shall smite it in the seven streams, and make men go over Rev. 16:12.dry shod.

And there shall be a Isa. 11:16; 19:23; 35:8 (8–10); D&C 133:27. TG Earth, Renewal of.highway for the remnant of his people which shall be left, from Assyria, like as it was to Israel in the day that he came up out of the land of Egypt.

div.p: In the millennial day all men will praise the Lord—He will dwell among them—Compare Isaiah 12. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: Isa. 12:1 (1–6).And in that day thou shalt say: O Lord, I will praise thee; though thou wast angry with me thine anger is turned away, and thou comfortedst me.

Behold, God is my salvation; I will Ps. 36:7 (7–8); Mosiah 4:6; Hel. 12:1.trust, and not be afraid; for the Lord Ex. 15:2; Ps. 83:18. TG Jesus Christ, Jehovah.
Jehovah is my TG Strength.strength and my TG Singing.song; he also has become my salvation.
Therefore, with joy shall ye draw TG Living Water.water out of the wells of salvation.
And in that day shall ye say: TG Praise; Thanksgiving.Praise the Lord, call upon his name, declare his doings among the people, make mention that his name is exalted.
Ps. 57:7 (7–11); 108:1 (1–5); Alma 26:8; D&C 136:28.Sing unto the Lord; for he hath done excellent things; this is known in all the earth.
Isa. 54:1 (1–8); Zeph. 3:14 (14–20); Zech. 2:10 (10–13).Cry out and shout, thou inhabitant of Zion; for great is the Holy One of Israel in the midst of thee.

div.p: The destruction of Babylon is a type of the destruction at the Second Coming—It will be a day of wrath and vengeance—Babylon (the world) will fall forever—Compare Isaiah 13. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: Isa. 13:1 (1–22).The burden of TG Babylon.Babylon, which Isaiah the son of Amoz did see.
Lift ye up a banner upon the high mountain, exalt the voice unto them, IE wave the hand, give a signal.shake the hand, that they may go into the gates of the nobles.
I have commanded my sanctified ones, I have also called my Joel 3:11.mighty ones, for mine anger is not upon them that rejoice in my highness.

The noise of the multitude in the mountains like as of a great people, a tumultuous noise of the Joel 3:14 (11, 14); Zeph. 3:8; Zech. 14:2 (2–3).kingdoms of nations Zech. 12:3 (2–9).gathered together, the Lord of Hosts mustereth the hosts of the battle.
They come from a far country, from the end of heaven, yea, the Lord, and the weapons of his indignation, to destroy the whole land.
Howl ye, for the TG Day of the Lord.day of the Lord is at hand; it shall come as a destruction from the Almighty.
Therefore shall all hands be faint, every man’s heart shall Jer. 9:7; D&C 133:41.melt;
And they shall be afraid; pangs and sorrows shall take hold of them; they shall be amazed one at another; their faces shall be as flames.
Behold, the day of the Lord cometh, cruel both with wrath and fierce anger, to lay the land desolate; and he shall TG Earth, Cleansing of.destroy the sinners thereof out of it.

For the Isa. 24:23; Ezek. 32:7 (7–8); Rev. 6:13 (12–13).stars of heaven and the TG Astronomy.constellations thereof shall not give their Joel 3:15.light; the TG World, End of.sun shall be darkened in his going forth, and the moon shall not cause her light to shine.

And I will Isa. 24:6; Mal. 4:1.punish the world for evil, and the Ex. 34:7; Prov. 21:12.wicked for their iniquity; I will cause the arrogancy of the Job 40:11; 2 Ne. 12:12; D&C 64:24.proud to cease, and will lay down the haughtiness of the terrible.
I will make a Isa. 4:1 (1–4).man more precious than fine gold; even a man than the golden wedge of Ophir.

Therefore, I will Hag. 2:6 (6–7); Heb. 12:26.shake the heavens, and the earth shall TG Earth, Renewal of.remove out of her place, in the wrath of the Lord of Hosts, and in the day of his fierce anger.
And it shall be as the chased roe, and as a sheep that no man taketh up; and they shall every man turn to his own people, and flee every one into his own TG Lands of Inheritance.land.
Every one that is proud shall be thrust through; yea, and every one that is Lam. 2:9; Alma 59:6 (5–6).joined to the wicked shall fall by the sword.
Their Job 27:14 (13–15).children also shall be Ps. 137:9 (8–9).dashed to pieces before their eyes; their houses shall be spoiled and their wives ravished.
Behold, I will stir up the Isa. 21:2.Medes against them, which shall not regard silver and gold, nor shall they delight in it.
Their bows shall also dash the young men to pieces; and they shall have no Lam. 2:2 (2, 17, 21).pity on the fruit of the womb; their eyes shall not spare children.

And Isa. 14:15 (4–27).Babylon, the glory of kingdoms, the beauty of the Chaldees’ excellency, shall be as when God overthrew Gen. 19:24 (24–25); Deut. 29:23; Jer. 49:18; 2 Ne. 13:9.Sodom and Gomorrah.

It shall never be Jer. 50:39 (3, 39–40); 51:29 (29, 62).inhabited, neither shall it be dwelt in from generation to generation: neither shall the Arabian pitch tent there; neither shall the shepherds make their fold there.
But Isa. 34:14 (11–15).wild beasts of the desert shall lie there; and their houses shall be full of doleful creatures; and owls shall dwell there, and satyrs shall dance there.

And the wild beasts of the islands shall cry in their desolate houses, and dragons in their pleasant palaces; and her time is near to come, and her day shall not be prolonged. For I will destroy her speedily; yea, for I will be merciful unto my people, but the wicked shall perish.

div.p: Israel will be gathered and will enjoy millennial rest—Lucifer was cast out of heaven for rebellion—Israel will triumph over Babylon (the world)—Compare Isaiah 14. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: Isa. 14:1 (1–32).For the Lord will have mercy on Jacob, and will yet Zech. 1:17; 2:12.choose Israel, and set them in their own land; and the Isa. 60:3 (3–5, 10). TG Stranger.strangers shall be joined with them, and they shall cleave to the house of Jacob.

And the people shall take them and bring them to their place; yea, from far unto the ends of the earth; and they shall return to their TG Promised Lands.lands of promise. And the house of Israel shall Amos 9:12.possess them, and the land of the Lord shall be for Isa. 60:14 (10–12, 14).servants and handmaids; and they shall take them captives unto whom they were captives; and they shall TG Kingdom of God, on Earth.rule over their oppressors.
And it shall come to pass in that day that the Lord shall give thee Josh. 1:13; D&C 84:24.rest, from thy sorrow, and from thy fear, and from the hard bondage wherein thou wast made to serve.
And it shall come to pass in that day, that thou shalt take up this proverb Hab. 2:6 (6–8).against the king of TG Babylon.Babylon, and say: How hath the oppressor ceased, the golden city ceased!
The Lord hath broken the staff of the TG Earth, Cleansing of; Wickedness.wicked, the scepters of the rulers.
IE Babylon.He who smote the people in wrath with a continual stroke, he that ruled the nations in anger, is persecuted, and none hindereth.
The whole earth is at TG Earth, Renewal of.rest, and is quiet; they break forth into Isa. 55:12 (12–13).singing.
Yea, the fir trees rejoice at thee, and also the cedars of Lebanon, saying: Since thou art laid down no feller is come up against us.

Ezek. 32:21. TG Hell.Hell from beneath is moved for thee to meet thee at thy coming; it stirreth up the TG Spirits in Prison.dead for thee, even all the chief ones of the earth; it hath raised up from their thrones all the kings of the nations.
All they shall speak and say unto thee: Art thou also become weak as we? Art thou become like unto us?
Thy pomp is brought down to the grave; the noise of thy viols is not heard; the worm is spread under thee, and the worms cover thee.

IE The fallen king of Babylon is typified by the fallen “son of the morning,” Lucifer in vv. 12–15. D&C 76:26.How art thou fallen from heaven, O TG Devil.Lucifer, son of the morning! Art thou cut down to the ground, which did weaken the nations!

For thou hast said in thy heart: Moses 4:1 (1–4).I will ascend into heaven, I will exalt my throne above the stars of God; I will sit also upon the mount of the congregation, in the sides of the north;
2 Thes. 2:4.I will ascend above the heights of the clouds; I will be like the Most High.
Yet thou shalt be brought down to hell, to the sides of the Ps. 28:1; 88:4; 1 Ne. 14:3.pit.
They that see thee shall narrowly look upon thee, and shall consider thee, and shall say: Is this the man that made the earth to tremble, that did shake kingdoms?
And made the world as a wilderness, and destroyed the cities thereof, and opened not the house of his prisoners?
All the kings of the nations, yea, all of them, lie in glory, every one of them in his own house.

But thou art cast out of thy grave like an abominable branch, and the remnant of those that are slain, thrust through with a sword, that go down to the stones of the pit; as a carcass trodden under feet.
Thou shalt not be joined with them in burial, because thou hast destroyed thy land and slain thy people; the Ps. 21:10 (10–11); 37:28; 109:13.seed of TG Wickedness.evil-doers shall never be renowned.
Prepare slaughter for his children for the Ex. 20:5.iniquities of their fathers, that they do not rise, nor possess the land, nor fill the face of the world with cities.
For I will rise up against them, saith the Lord of Hosts, and cut off from Babylon the Prov. 10:7; Jer. 51:62.name, and remnant, and son, and Job 18:19.nephew, saith the Lord.
I will also make it a Isa. 34:11 (11–15).possession for the bittern, and pools of water; and I will sweep it with the besom of destruction, saith the Lord of Hosts.
The Lord of Hosts hath sworn, saying: Surely as I have thought, so shall it come to pass; and as I have purposed, so shall it stand—
That I will bring the Assyrian in my land, and upon my mountains tread him under foot; then shall his Isa. 10:27.yoke depart from off them, and his burden depart from off their shoulders.
This is the purpose that is purposed upon the whole earth; and this is the hand that is stretched out upon all nations.
For the Lord of Hosts hath purposed, and who shall disannul? And his hand is stretched out, and who shall turn it back?
In the year that king 2 Kgs. 16:20.Ahaz died was this burden.

Rejoice not thou, whole Palestina, because the rod of him that 2 Chr. 26:6.smote thee is broken; for out of the serpent’s root shall come forth a cockatrice, and his 2 Kgs. 18:8 (1, 8).fruit shall be a TG Jesus Christ, Types of, in Anticipation.fiery flying serpent.
And the firstborn of the poor shall feed, and the needy shall lie down in safety; and I will kill thy root with famine, and he shall slay thy remnant.
Howl, O gate; cry, O city; thou, whole Palestina, art dissolved; for there shall come from the north a smoke, and none shall be alone in his appointed times.
What shall then answer the messengers of the nations? That the Lord hath founded TG Zion.Zion, and the Zeph. 3:12.poor of his people shall trust in it.

div.p: Nephi glories in plainness—Isaiah’s prophecies will be understood in the last days—The Jews will return from Babylon, crucify the Messiah, and be scattered and scourged—They will be restored when they believe in the Messiah—He will first come six hundred years after Lehi left Jerusalem—The Nephites keep the law of Moses and believe in Christ, who is the Holy One of Israel. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: Now I, Nephi, do speak somewhat concerning the words which I have written, which have been spoken by the mouth of Isaiah. For behold, Isaiah spake many things which were Jacob 4:14. TG Symbolism.hard for many of my people to understand; for they know not concerning the manner of prophesying among the Jews.
For I, Nephi, have not taught them many things concerning the manner of the Jews; for their 2 Kgs. 17:13–20.works were works of darkness, and their doings were doings of abominations.

Wherefore, I write unto my people, unto all those that shall receive hereafter these things which I write, TG God, Knowledge about; Prophets, Mission of; Scriptures, Value of.that they may know the judgments of God, that they come upon all nations, according to the word which he hath spoken.

Wherefore, hearken, O my people, which are of the house of Israel, and give ear unto my words; for because the words of Isaiah are not plain unto you, nevertheless they are plain unto all those that are filled with the TG Holy Ghost, Source of Testimony.spirit of TG Prophecy.prophecy. But I give unto you a 2 Ne. 31:1.prophecy, according to the spirit which is in me; wherefore I shall prophesy according to the 2 Ne. 31:3; 33:5; Jacob 2:11; 4:13.plainness which hath been with me from the time that I came out from Jerusalem with my father; for behold, my soul delighteth in TG Communication; Plainness.plainness unto my people, that they may learn.

Yea, and my soul delighteth in the words of 1 Ne. 19:23.Isaiah, for I came out from Jerusalem, and mine eyes hath beheld the things of the TG Israel, Judah, People of.Jews, and I know that the Jews do Matt. 13:11 (10–17).understand the things of the prophets, and there is none other people that understand the things which were spoken unto the Jews like unto them, save it be that they are taught after the manner of the things of the Jews.

But behold, I, Nephi, have not taught my children after the manner of the Jews; but behold, I, of myself, have dwelt at Jerusalem, wherefore I know concerning the regions round about; and I have made mention unto my children concerning the judgments of God, which 2 Ne. 6:8; Hel. 8:20 (20–21).hath come to pass among the Jews, unto my children, according to all that which Isaiah hath spoken, and I do not write them.

But behold, I proceed with mine own prophecy, according to my 2 Ne. 32:7; Alma 13:23; Ether 12:39.plainness; in the which I Ezek. 12:23 (21–25).know that no man can err; nevertheless, in the days that the prophecies of Isaiah shall be fulfilled men shall know of a surety, at the times when they shall come to pass.

Wherefore, they are of TG Scriptures, Value of.worth unto the children of men, and he that supposeth that they are not, unto them will I speak particularly, and confine the words unto mine 2 Ne. 27:6; Enos 1:16 (13–16); Morm. 5:12; D&C 3:20 (16–20).own people; for I know that they shall be of great worth unto them in the TG Last Days.last days; for in that day shall they understand them; wherefore, for their good have I written them.

And as one generation hath been Lam. 1–5; Matt. 23:37.destroyed among the Jews because of iniquity, even so have they been destroyed from generation to generation according to their iniquities; and never hath any of them been destroyed save it were Ezek. 4:3; Amos 3:7; D&C 5:20.foretold them by the prophets of the Lord.

Wherefore, it hath been told them concerning the destruction which should come upon them, immediately after my father left 1 Ne. 7:13; 2 Ne. 6:8; Omni 1:15; Hel. 8:21 (20–21).Jerusalem; nevertheless, they TG Hardheartedness.hardened their hearts; and according to my prophecy they have been destroyed, save it be those which are 2 Kgs. 24:14 (14–15); Jer. 52:15 (3–15); 1 Ne. 1:13; 10:3.carried away Lam. 1:3 (1–3).captive into Babylon.

And now this I speak because of the TG Teaching with the Spirit.spirit which is in me. And notwithstanding they have been carried away they shall return again, and possess the land of Jerusalem; wherefore, they shall be Jer. 24:6 (5–7).restored again to the TG Lands of Inheritance.land of their inheritance.

But, behold, they shall have TG War.wars, and rumors of wars; and when the day cometh that the TG Jesus Christ, Divine Sonship.Only Begotten of the Father, yea, even the Father of heaven and of earth, shall TG Jesus Christ, Birth of.manifest himself unto them in the flesh, behold, they will reject him, because of their iniquities, and the hardness of their hearts, and the stiffness of their necks.

Behold, they will TG Jesus Christ, Crucifixion of.crucify him; and after he is laid in a Luke 23:53; John 19:41 (41–42); 1 Ne. 19:10.sepulchre for the space of Mosiah 3:10.three days he shall Mal. 4:2. TG Jesus Christ, Prophecies about; Jesus Christ, Resurrection; Resurrection.rise from the dead, with healing in his wings; and all those who shall believe on his name shall be saved in the kingdom of God. Wherefore, my soul delighteth to prophesy concerning him, for I have 1 Ne. 11:27 (13–34).seen his day, and my heart doth magnify his holy name.

And behold it shall come to pass that after the TG Jesus Christ, Messiah.Messiah hath risen from the dead, and hath manifested himself unto his people, unto as many as will believe on his name, behold, Jerusalem shall be Matt. 24:2 (1–2); Luke 21:24.destroyed again; for Ps. 83:17 (2–17); D&C 71:7; Moses 7:15 (14–16).wo unto them that fight against God and the people of his TG Jesus Christ, Head of the Church.church.

Wherefore, the TG Israel, Judah, People of.Jews shall be Neh. 1:8 (7–9); 2 Ne. 10:6; 3 Ne. 16:8. TG Israel, Bondage of, in Other Lands; Israel, Scattering of.scattered among all nations; yea, and also TG Babylon.Babylon shall be destroyed; wherefore, the Jews shall be scattered by other nations.

And after they have been Ezek. 34:12; Morm. 5:14.scattered, and the Lord God hath scourged them by other nations for the space of many generations, yea, even down from generation to generation until they shall be persuaded to 2 Ne. 10:7 (5–9); 30:7 (7–8).believe in Christ, the Son of God, and the atonement, which is infinite for all mankind—and when that day shall come that they shall believe in Christ, and worship the Father in his name, with pure hearts and Job 17:9; D&C 88:86.clean hands, and look not forward any more for TG False Christs.another Messiah, then, at that time, the day will come that it must needs be expedient that they should believe these things.

And the Lord will set his hand again the second time to Gen. 49:10; 2 Ne. 21:11; 29:1. TG Israel, Gathering of; Israel, Restoration of; Restoration of the Gospel.restore his people from their lost and fallen state. Wherefore, he will proceed to do a Isa. 29:14; 2 Ne. 27:26; 3 Ne. 28:32 (31–33).marvelous work and a wonder among the children of men.

Wherefore, he shall bring forth 3 Ne. 16:4.his 2 Ne. 29:11; 33:14 (11, 14–15); W of M 1:11; 3 Ne. 27:25 (23–27); Ether 5:4.words unto them, which words shall TG Judgment, the Last.judge them at the last day, for they shall be given them for the purpose of 2 Ne. 26:12; Morm. 3:21.convincing them of the true Messiah, who was rejected by them; and unto the convincing of them that they need not look forward any more for a Messiah to come, for there should not any come, save it should be a TG False Christs.false Messiah which should deceive the people; for there is save one TG Jesus Christ, Messiah.Messiah spoken of by the prophets, and that Messiah is he who should be rejected of the Jews.

For according to the words of the prophets, the TG Jesus Christ, Betrayal of; Jesus Christ, Birth of.Messiah cometh in 1 Ne. 10:4; 19:8; 3 Ne. 1:1.six hundred years from the time that my father left Jerusalem; and according to the words of the prophets, and also the word of the 2 Ne. 10:3.angel of God, his TG Jesus Christ, Prophecies about.name shall be Jesus Christ, the TG Jesus Christ, Divine Sonship.Son of God.

And now, my brethren, I have spoken plainly that ye cannot err. And as the Lord God liveth that Ex. 3:10 (2–10); 1 Ne. 17:24 (24, 31, 40); 19:10.brought Israel up out of the land of Egypt, and gave unto Moses power that he should John 3:14; 1 Ne. 17:41.heal the nations after they had been bitten by the poisonous serpents, if they would cast their eyes unto the 2 Kgs. 18:4; Alma 33:19; Hel. 8:14 (14–15).serpent which he did raise up before them, and also gave him power that he should smite the Ex. 17:6; Num. 20:11; Neh. 9:15; 1 Ne. 17:29; 20:21.rock and the water should come forth; yea, behold I say unto you, that as these things are 1 Ne. 14:30; Mosiah 1:6.true, and as the Lord God liveth, there is none other Hosea 13:4; Acts 4:12; 1 Jn. 3:23 (19–24); 1 Ne. 10:6; 2 Ne. 2:6 (5–8); Mosiah 16:5 (4–5); Alma 12:22 (22–25). TG Jesus Christ, Savior.name given under heaven save it be this Jesus Christ, of which I have spoken, whereby man can be saved.

Wherefore, for this cause hath the Lord God promised unto me that these things which I 2 Ne. 27:6.write shall be kept and preserved, and handed down unto my seed, from generation to generation, that the promise may be fulfilled unto Joseph, that his seed should never Amos 5:15; Alma 46:24 (24–27).perish as long as the earth should stand.

Wherefore, these things shall go from generation to generation as long as the earth shall stand; and they shall go according to the will and pleasure of God; and the nations who shall possess them shall be 2 Ne. 29:11; 33:15 (10–15); 3 Ne. 27:25 (23–27); Ether 4:10 (8–10).judged of them according to the words which are written.

For we labor diligently to write, to TG Family, Children, Responsibilities toward.persuade our children, and also our brethren, to believe in Christ, and to be reconciled to God; for we know that it is by Ps. 130:4 (3–4); Rom. 3:20 (20–24); 7:5; 2 Ne. 2:5 (4–10); Mosiah 13:32; Alma 42:14 (12–16); D&C 20:30; 138:4. TG Grace.grace that we are saved, after all we can James 2:24 (14–26). TG Good Works.do.
And, notwithstanding we believe in Christ, we Jacob 4:5.keep the law of Moses, and look forward with steadfastness unto Christ, until the law shall be fulfilled.

For, for this end was the TG Law of Moses.law given; wherefore the law hath become Rom. 7:4 (4–6); D&C 74:5 (2–6).dead unto us, and we are made alive in Christ because of our faith; yet we keep the law because of the commandments.

And we Jacob 4:12; Jarom 1:11; Mosiah 3:13; 16:6.talk of Christ, we rejoice in Christ, we preach of Christ, we Luke 10:24 (23–24).prophesy of Christ, and we write according to our prophecies, that our TG Family, Children, Responsibilities toward.children may know to what source they may look for a TG Remission of Sins.remission of their sins.

Wherefore, we speak concerning the law that our children may know the deadness of the law; and they, by knowing the deadness of the law, may look forward unto that life which is in Christ, and know for what end the law was given. And after the law is fulfilled in Christ, that they need not harden their hearts against him when the law ought to be done away.

And now behold, my people, ye are a Mosiah 3:14; Alma 9:31. TG Stiffnecked.stiffnecked people; wherefore, I have spoken plainly unto you, that ye cannot misunderstand. And the words which I have spoken shall stand as a TG Testimony.testimony against you; for they are sufficient to 1 Kgs. 8:36; 2 Ne. 33:10. TG Teaching.teach any man the 1 Sam. 12:23; Isa. 45:19; 2 Pet. 2:15.right way; for the right way is to believe in Christ and deny him not; for by denying him ye also deny the prophets and the law.

And now behold, I say unto you that the right way is to believe in Christ, and deny him not; and Christ is the Holy One of Israel; wherefore ye must bow down before him, and TG Worship.worship him with all your Deut. 6:5; Mark 12:30 (29–31).might, mind, and strength, and your whole soul; and if ye do this ye shall in nowise be cast out.
And, inasmuch as it shall be expedient, ye must keep the 4 Ne. 1:12.performances and TG Ordinance.ordinances of God until the law shall be fulfilled which was given unto Moses.

div.p: Christ will minister to the Nephites—Nephi foresees the destruction of his people—They will speak from the dust—The Gentiles will build up false churches and secret combinations—The Lord forbids men to practice priestcrafts. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: And after Christ shall have 3 Ne. 11:8 (1–12). TG Jesus Christ, Resurrection.risen from the dead he shall 1 Ne. 11:7; 12:6.show himself unto you, my children, and my beloved brethren; and the words which he shall speak unto you shall be the 3 Ne. 15:9 (2–10).law which ye shall do.
For behold, I say unto you that I have beheld that many generations shall pass away, and there shall be great wars and contentions among my people.

And after the Messiah shall come there shall be 1 Ne. 12:4 (4–6). TG Signs.signs given unto my people of his TG Jesus Christ, Birth of.birth, and also of his TG Jesus Christ, Death of.death and resurrection; and great and terrible shall that day be unto the wicked, for they shall perish; and they perish because they cast out the TG Prophets, Rejection of.prophets, and the saints, and stone them, and slay them; wherefore the cry of the Gen. 4:10; 2 Ne. 28:10; Morm. 8:27.blood of the saints shall ascend up to God from the ground against them.
Wherefore, all those who are proud, and that do wickedly, the day that cometh shall 3 Ne. 8:14 (14–24); 9:3 (3–9).burn them up, saith the Lord of Hosts, for they shall be as stubble.

And they that kill the Ps. 105:15.prophets, and the saints, the depths of the earth shall Num. 16:32; 1 Ne. 19:11; 3 Ne. 10:14.swallow them up, saith the Lord of Hosts; and Hosea 10:8; Alma 12:14.mountains shall cover them, and whirlwinds shall carry them away, and buildings shall fall upon them and crush them to pieces and grind them to powder.

And they shall be visited with thunderings, and lightnings, and earthquakes, and all manner of destructions, for the 3 Ne. 8:8; 9:3–11.fire of the anger of the Lord shall be kindled against them, and they shall be as stubble, and the day that cometh shall consume them, saith the Lord of Hosts.

Morm. 6:17 (17–22).O the pain, and the anguish of my soul for the loss of the slain of my people! For I, Nephi, have seen it, and it well nigh consumeth me before the presence of the Lord; but I must cry unto my God: Thy ways are Rom. 3:5; Alma 42:1 (1, 13–25).just.

But behold, the righteous that hearken unto the words of the prophets, and destroy them not, but look forward unto Christ with TG Steadfastness.steadfastness for the signs which are given, notwithstanding all TG Persecution.persecution—behold, they are they which shall 3 Ne. 10:12 (12–13).not perish.

But the Son of Righteousness shall Alma 16:20.appear unto them; and he shall John 12:40; 3 Ne. 9:13 (13–14); 18:32; D&C 112:13.heal them, and they shall have TG Peace.peace with him, until 1 Ne. 12:11 (11–12); 3 Ne. 27:32 (30–32).three generations shall have passed away, and many of the Alma 45:12 (10–12); Hel. 13:10 (5, 9–10).fourth generation shall have passed away in righteousness.

And when these things have passed away a speedy Mosiah 12:8; Alma 45:11 (9–14); Hel. 13:6 (5–6).destruction cometh unto my people; for, notwithstanding the pains of my soul, I have seen it; wherefore, I know that it shall come to pass; and they sell themselves for naught; for, for the reward of their pride and their TG Foolishness.foolishness they shall reap destruction; for because they yield unto the devil and TG Agency.choose works of Job 38:15; John 3:19.darkness rather than light, therefore they must go down to Job 24:24 (17–24). TG Hell.hell.

For the Spirit of the Lord will not always Gen. 6:3; Ether 2:15; Moses 8:17.strive with man. And when the Spirit TG Holy Ghost, Loss of.ceaseth to strive with man then cometh speedy destruction, and this grieveth my soul.

And as I spake concerning the 2 Ne. 25:18.convincing of the 2 Ne. 30:7 (7–8); Morm. 5:14 (12–14); D&C 19:27. TG Israel, Judah, People of.Jews, that Jesus is the Morm. 3:21.very Christ, it must needs be that the Gentiles be convinced also that Jesus is the Christ, the 2 Ne. 19:6; Mosiah 3:5; Alma 11:39 (38–39, 44); Moro. 7:22; 8:18.Eternal 1 Ne. 19:10 (7, 10); 2 Ne. 10:3; Mosiah 7:27; 27:31 (30–31); 3 Ne. 11:14.God;

And that he TG God, Access to.manifesteth himself unto all those who believe in him, by the power of the TG Holy Ghost, Mission of.Holy Ghost; yea, unto every nation, kindred, tongue, and people, working mighty TG Miracle.miracles, signs, and wonders, among the children of men according to their TG Faith.faith.
But behold, I prophesy unto you concerning the TG Last Days.last days; concerning the days when the Lord God shall TG Restoration of the Gospel.bring these things forth unto the children of men.

After my seed and the seed of my brethren shall have 1 Ne. 12:22 (22–23); 15:13.dwindled in unbelief, and shall have been smitten by the Gentiles; yea, after the Lord God shall have Isa. 29:3.camped against them round about, and shall have laid siege against them with a mount, and raised forts against them; and after they shall have been brought down low in the dust, even that they are not, yet the words of the righteous shall be written, and the Ex. 3:9 (7, 9); Mosiah 21:15; D&C 109:49.prayers of the faithful shall be heard, and all those who have D&C 3:18.dwindled in unbelief shall not be forgotten.

For those who shall be destroyed shall Isa. 29:4; 2 Ne. 3:20; 33:13; Morm. 8:23 (23, 26); 9:30; Moro. 10:27. TG Book of Mormon.speak unto them out of the ground, and their speech shall be low out of the dust, and their voice shall be as one that hath a familiar spirit; for the Lord God will give unto him power, that he may whisper concerning them, even as it were out of the ground; and their speech shall whisper out of the dust.

For thus saith the Lord God: They shall 1 Ne. 13:40 (39–42); 2 Ne. 27:6 (6–26); 29:12.write the things which shall be done among them, and they shall be written and TG Scriptures, Preservation of.sealed up in a book, and those who have dwindled in TG Unbelief.unbelief shall not have them, for they Enos 1:14; Morm. 6:6.seek to destroy the things of God.

Wherefore, as those who have been destroyed have been destroyed speedily; and the multitude of their Isa. 29:5.terrible ones shall be as Hosea 13:3 (1–4); Morm. 5:16 (16–18).chaff that passeth away—yea, thus saith the Lord God: It shall be at an instant, suddenly—
And it shall come to pass, that those who have dwindled in unbelief shall be 1 Ne. 13:14; 3 Ne. 16:8 (8–9); 20:27 (27–28); Morm. 5:9.smitten by the hand of the Gentiles.

And the Gentiles are lifted up in the Prov. 11:2; D&C 38:39. TG Pride.pride of their eyes, and have 1 Ne. 13:34 (29, 34); 14:1 (1–3). TG Apostasy of the Early Christian Church.stumbled, because of the greatness of their Ezek. 3:20; 14:4 (3–7).stumbling block, that they have built up many 1 Ne. 14:10 (9–10); 22:23; Morm. 8:28 (25–41).churches; nevertheless, they 2 Ne. 28:5 (4–6); Morm. 9:26 (7–26).put down the power and miracles of God, and preach up unto themselves their own wisdom and their own 1 Tim. 6:20; 2 Ne. 9:28; 28:4 (4, 15); D&C 1:19. TG Learn.learning, that they may get gain and Isa. 3:15; 2 Ne. 13:15.grind upon the face of the poor.
And there are many churches built up which cause TG Envy.envyings, and Rom. 16:17 (17–18). TG Strife.strifes, and TG Malice.malice.

And there are also secret TG Secret Combinations.combinations, even as in times of old, according to the combinations of the 2 Ne. 28:21.devil, for he is the founder of all these things; yea, the founder of murder, and Lev. 19:26.works of darkness; yea, and he leadeth them by the neck with a flaxen cord, until he bindeth them with his strong cords forever.
For behold, my beloved brethren, I say unto you that the Lord God worketh not in Isa. 48:16 (16–18).darkness.

He doeth not 2 Ne. 2:27; Jacob 5:41; Alma 26:37.anything save it be for the benefit of the world; for he John 3:16.loveth the world, even that he layeth down his own life that he may draw John 12:32; 2 Ne. 9:5.all men unto him. Wherefore, he commandeth none that they shall not partake of his salvation.

Behold, doth he cry unto any, saying: Depart from me? Behold, I say unto you, Nay; but he saith: 1 Ne. 1:14; Alma 5:34 (33–36); 3 Ne. 9:14 (13–14).Come unto me all ye Mark 16:15–16.ends of the earth, Isa. 55:1.buy milk and honey, without money and without price.
Behold, hath he commanded any that they should Mark 9:39 (38–40).depart out of the synagogues, or out of the houses of worship? Behold, I say unto you, Nay.

Hath he commanded any that they should not partake of his TG Salvation.salvation? Behold I say unto you, Nay; but he hath Eph. 2:8.given it free for all men; and he hath commanded his people that they should persuade all men to TG Repent.repentance.

Behold, hath the Lord commanded any that they should not partake of his goodness? Behold I say unto you, Nay; but Rom. 2:11; Alma 13:5.all men are privileged the one 1 Ne. 17:35 (33–35).like unto the other, and none are forbidden.

He commandeth that there shall be no Acts 8:9; Alma 1:12; 3 Ne. 16:10. TG Priestcraft.priestcrafts; for, behold, priestcrafts are that men preach and set TG Unrighteous Dominion.themselves up for a light unto the world, that they may get Ezek. 22:27.gain and D&C 58:39; 121:35 (34–37).praise of the world; but they seek not the Ezek. 34:3.welfare of Zion.

Behold, the Lord hath forbidden this thing; wherefore, the Lord God hath given a commandment that all men should have TG Charity.charity, which Moro. 7:47 (47–48).charity is TG God, Love of; Love.love. And except they should have charity they were nothing. Wherefore, if they should have charity they would not suffer the laborer in Zion to perish.
But the TG Industry.laborer in TG Zion.Zion shall labor for Zion; for if they labor for Jacob 2:18 (17–19); D&C 11:7; 38:39.money they shall perish.

And again, the Lord God hath TG Commandments of God; Law of Moses.commanded that men should not murder; that they should not lie; that they should not TG Stealing.steal; that they should not take the name of the Lord their God in TG Profanity.vain; that they should not TG Envy.envy; that they should not have TG Malice.malice; that they should not contend one with another; that they should not commit TG Chastity; Whore.whoredoms; and that they should do none of these things; for whoso doeth them shall perish.

For none of these iniquities come of the Lord; for he doeth that which is good among the children of men; and he doeth nothing save it be plain unto the children of men; and he Jude 1:3.inviteth them Alma 19:36.all to TG God, Access to.come unto him and partake of his goodness; and he Acts 10:28 (9–35, 44). TG Justice.denieth none that come unto him, black and white, Rom. 2:11; 1 Ne. 17:35 (35–40).bond and free, male and female; and he remembereth the Jonah 4:11 (10–11); 2 Ne. 29:12; Alma 26:37 (27, 37). TG Heathen.heathen; and all are alike unto God, both Jew and Gentile.

div.p: Darkness and apostasy will cover the earth in the last days—The Book of Mormon will come forth—Three witnesses will testify of the book—The learned man will say he cannot read the sealed book—The Lord will do a marvelous work and a wonder—Compare Isaiah 29. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: But, behold, in the TG Last Days.last days, or in the days of the Gentiles—yea, behold all the nations of the Gentiles and also the Jews, both those who shall come upon this land and those who shall be upon other lands, yea, even upon all the lands of the earth, behold, they will be Isa. 29:9. TG Abomination; Iniquity; Wickedness.drunken with iniquity and all manner of abominations—

And when that day shall come they shall be Isa. 29:6 (6–10); Morm. 8:29.visited of the Lord of Hosts, with thunder and with earthquake, and with a great noise, and with storm, and with tempest, and with the Isa. 24:6; 66:16; Jacob 6:3; 3 Ne. 25:1.flame of devouring fire.

And all the Isa. 29:7 (7–8).nations that 1 Ne. 22:14. TG Protection, Divine.fight against Zion, and that distress her, shall be as a dream of a night vision; yea, it shall be unto them, even as unto a hungry man which dreameth, and behold he eateth but he awaketh and his soul is empty; or like unto a thirsty man which dreameth, and behold he drinketh but he awaketh and behold he is faint, and his soul hath appetite; yea, even so shall the multitude of all the nations be that fight against Mount Zion.

For behold, all ye that doeth iniquity, stay yourselves and wonder, for ye shall cry out, and cry; yea, ye shall be Rev. 17:6 (1–6); 2 Ne. 8:21.drunken but not with wine, ye shall stagger but not with strong drink.

For behold, the Lord hath poured out upon you the spirit of deep sleep. For behold, ye have closed your TG Spiritual Blindness.eyes, and ye have 2 Chr. 24:19; Jer. 26:5; 37:15; Zech. 1:4 (2–5).rejected the prophets; and your rulers, and the seers hath he covered because of your iniquity.

And it shall come to pass that the Lord God shall bring forth unto Jarom 1:2; Morm. 5:12 (12–13).you the words of a 2 Ne. 26:17 (16–17); 29:12. TG Book of Mormon.book, and they shall be the words of them which have slumbered.

And behold the book shall be Isa. 29:11 (11–12); Ether 3:27. TG Seal.sealed; and in the book shall be a Mosiah 8:19; Ether 3:25 (20–28); 4:4.revelation from God, from the beginning of the world to the Ether 1:2–4; 13:1–13.ending thereof.

Wherefore, because of the things which are 3 Ne. 26:9 (7–12, 18); Ether 4:5; 5:1; D&C 17:6.sealed up, the things which are sealed shall not be delivered in the day of the wickedness and abominations of the people. Wherefore the book shall be kept from them.

But the book shall be delivered unto a man, and he shall deliver the words of the book, which are the words of those who have slumbered in the dust, and he shall deliver these words unto JS—H 1:64.another;

But the words which are Dan. 12:9; 1 Ne. 14:26; D&C 35:18; JS—H 1:65.sealed he shall not deliver, neither shall he deliver the book. For the book shall be sealed by the power of God, and the revelation which was sealed shall be kept in the book until the own due time of the Lord, that they may come forth; for behold, they Ether 4:15. TG God, Omniscience of.reveal all things from the foundation of the world unto the end thereof.

And the day cometh that the words of the book which were sealed shall be read upon the house tops; and they shall be read by the power of Christ; and all things shall be Luke 12:3; Morm. 5:8; D&C 121:26–31.revealed unto the children of men which ever have been among the children of men, and which ever will be even unto the end of the earth.

Wherefore, at that day when the book shall be delivered unto the man of whom I have spoken, the book shall be hid from the eyes of the world, that the eyes of none shall behold it save it be that 2 Ne. 11:3; Ether 5:3 (2–4); D&C 5:11 (11, 15); 17:1.three Deut. 19:15.witnesses shall behold it, by the power of God, besides him to whom the book shall be delivered; and they shall testify to the truth of the book and the things therein.

And there is D&C 5:14 (3, 14).none other which shall view it, save it be a few according to the will of God, to bear testimony of his word unto the children of men; for the Lord God hath said that the words of the faithful should speak as if it were 2 Ne. 3:19 (19–20); 33:13 (13–15); Morm. 9:30; Moro. 10:27.from the dead.

Wherefore, the Lord God will proceed to bring forth the words of the book; and in the mouth of as many witnesses as seemeth him good will he establish his word; and wo be unto him that 2 Ne. 28:29 (29–30); Ether 4:8.rejecteth the word of God!

But behold, it shall come to pass that the Lord God shall say unto him to whom he shall deliver the book: Take these words which are not sealed and deliver them to another, that he may show them unto the learned, saying: Isa. 29:11.Read this, I pray thee. And the learned shall say: Bring hither the book, and I will read them.
And now, because of the glory of the world and to get TG Priestcraft.gain will they say this, and not for the glory of God.
And the man shall say: I cannot bring the book, for it is sealed.
Then shall the learned say: I cannot read it.

Wherefore it shall come to pass, that the Lord God will Isa. 29:12.deliver again the book and the words thereof to him that is not learned; and the man that is not learned shall say: I am not learned.

Then shall the Lord God say unto him: The learned shall not read them, for they have rejected them, and I am Ex. 4:11 (11–12); Jer. 1:7 (7–9).able to do mine own work; wherefore thou shalt read the words which I shall give unto thee.
Ether 5:1.Touch not the things which are sealed, for I will bring them forth in mine own due time; for I will show unto the children of men that I am able to do mine own work.

Wherefore, when thou hast read the words which I have commanded thee, and obtained the TG Witness.witnesses which I have promised unto thee, then shalt thou seal up the book again, and hide it up unto me, that I may preserve the words which thou hast not read, until I shall see fit in mine own TG God, Wisdom of.wisdom to Ether 4:7 (6–7). TG Mysteries of Godliness.reveal all things unto the children of men.

For behold, I am God; and I am a God of TG Marvelous; Miracle.miracles; and I will show unto the TG World.world that I am the same yesterday, today, and forever; and I W of M 1:7.work not among the children of men save it be Heb. 11; Ether 12:12 (7–22).according to their faith.
And again it shall come to pass that the Lord shall say unto him that shall read the words that shall be delivered him:

Isa. 29:13 (13–24).Forasmuch as this people draw near unto me with their mouth, and with their lips do Matt. 15:8 (7–9). TG Honor; Respect.honor me, but have removed their TG Hardheartedness.hearts far from me, and their fear towards me is taught by the 2 Ne. 28:31.precepts of men—

Therefore, I will proceed to do a 1 Ne. 22:8; 2 Ne. 29:1 (1–2). TG Restoration of the Gospel.marvelous work among this people, yea, a Isa. 29:14; 2 Ne. 25:17.marvelous work and a wonder, for the TG Wisdom.wisdom of their wise and TG Learn.learned shall perish, and the TG Knowledge.understanding of their TG Prudence.prudent shall be hid.

And Isa. 29:15 (15–16).wo unto them that seek deep to hide their TG Conspiracy; Counsel.counsel from the Lord! And their works are in the TG Secret Combinations.dark; and they say: Who seeth us, and who knoweth us? And they also say: Surely, your turning of things upside down shall be esteemed as the Jer. 18:6.potter’s clay. But behold, I will show unto them, saith the Lord of Hosts, that I TG God, Omniscience of.know all their works. For shall the work say of him that made it, he made me not? Or shall the thing framed say of him that framed it, he had no understanding?

But behold, saith the Lord of Hosts: I will show unto the children of men that it is yet a very little while and Lebanon shall be turned into a fruitful field; and the TG Earth, Renewal of.fruitful field shall be esteemed as a forest.
Isa. 29:18.And in that day shall the TG Deaf.deaf hear the words of the book, and the eyes of the blind shall see out of obscurity and out of darkness.
And the TG Meek.meek also shall increase, and their D&C 101:36.joy shall be in the Lord, and the poor among men shall rejoice in the Holy One of Israel.
For assuredly as the Lord liveth they shall see that the Isa. 29:20.terrible one is brought to naught, and the scorner is consumed, and all that watch for iniquity are cut off;

And they that make a man an Luke 11:54 (53–54); Acts 22:22. TG Offense.offender for a word, and lay a snare for him that reproveth in the Amos 5:10 (7, 10).gate, and 2 Ne. 28:16.turn aside the just for a thing of naught.
Therefore, thus saith the Lord, who redeemed Abraham, concerning the house of Jacob: Jacob shall TG Israel, Restoration of.not now be ashamed, neither shall his face now wax pale.
But when he Isa. 29:23.seeth his children, the work of my hands, in the midst of him, they shall sanctify my name, and sanctify the Holy One of Jacob, and shall fear the God of Israel.
They also that 2 Ne. 28:14; D&C 33:4.erred in spirit shall come to understanding, and they that murmured shall Dan. 12:4 (4–10).learn doctrine.

div.p: Many false churches will be built up in the last days—They will teach false, vain, and foolish doctrines—Apostasy will abound because of false teachers—The devil will rage in the hearts of men—He will teach all manner of false doctrines. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: And now, behold, my brethren, I have spoken unto you, according as the Spirit hath constrained me; wherefore, I know that they must surely come to pass.

And the things which shall be written out of the TG Book of Mormon; Restoration of the Gospel.book shall be of great 1 Ne. 13:39 (34–42); 14:5 (1–5); 22:9; 2 Ne. 30:3; 3 Ne. 21:6.worth unto the children of men, and especially unto our seed, which is a TG Israel, Remnant of.remnant of the house of Israel.

For it shall come to pass in that day that the 1 Cor. 1:13 (10–13); 1 Ne. 22:23; 4 Ne. 1:26 (25–29); Morm. 8:28 (28, 32–38).churches which are built up, and not unto the Lord, when the one shall say unto the other: Behold, I, I am the Lord’s; and the others shall say: I, I am the Lord’s; and thus shall every one say that hath built up TG False Doctrine.churches, and not unto the Lord—

And they shall contend one with another; and their priests shall contend one with another, and they shall teach with their 2 Ne. 9:28; 26:20.learning, and deny the 1 Cor. 2:4 (1–9).Holy Ghost, which giveth utterance.

And they 2 Ne. 26:20; Morm. 9:26 (7–26).deny the 2 Tim. 3:5.power of God, the Holy One of Israel; and they say unto the people: Hearken unto us, and hear ye our precept; for behold there is Alma 30:28.no God today, for the Lord and the Redeemer hath done his work, and he hath given his power unto men;

Behold, hearken ye unto my precept; if they shall say there is a miracle wrought by the hand of the Lord, believe it not; for this day he is not a God of 3 Ne. 29:7; Morm. 8:26; 9:15 (15–26).miracles; he hath done his work.
Yea, and there shall be many which shall say: Prov. 16:25; 1 Cor. 15:32; Alma 30:17 (17–18).Eat, drink, and be merry, for tomorrow we die; and it shall be well with us.

And there shall also be many which shall say: Isa. 22:13.Eat, drink, and be TG Worldliness.merry; nevertheless, fear God—he will Morm. 8:31.justify in committing a little Mal. 2:17.sin; yea, D&C 10:25; Moses 4:4. TG Lying.lie a little, take the advantage of one because of his words, dig a Job 6:27; Prov. 26:27; 1 Ne. 14:3; 22:14; D&C 109:25.pit for thy neighbor; there is Alma 30:17.no harm in this; and do all these things, for tomorrow we die; and if it so be that we are guilty, God will beat us with a few stripes, and at last we shall be saved in the kingdom of God.

Yea, and there shall be many which shall teach after this manner, TG False Doctrine.false and vain and Ezek. 13:3; Hel. 13:29.foolish Matt. 15:9; Col. 2:22 (18–22).doctrines, and shall be puffed up in their hearts, and shall seek deep to hide their counsels from the Lord; and their works shall be in the dark.
And the Gen. 4:10; Rev. 6:10 (9–11); 18:24 (22–24); 19:2; 2 Ne. 26:3; Morm. 8:27; Ether 8:22 (22–24); D&C 87:7.blood of the saints shall cry from the ground against them.
Yea, they have all gone out of the Hel. 6:31; D&C 132:25 (22–25).way; they have become Morm. 8:28 (28–41); D&C 33:4.corrupted.

Because of Prov. 28:25. TG Pride.pride, and because of Jer. 23:21 (21–32); 50:6; 3 Ne. 14:15. TG False Prophets.false teachers, and TG False Doctrine.false doctrine, their churches have become corrupted, and their churches are lifted up; because of pride they are puffed up.

They Ezek. 34:8; Morm. 8:37 (37–41).rob the Ezek. 18:12; 2 Ne. 13:14 (14–15); Hel. 4:12 (11–13).poor because of their fine sanctuaries; they rob the poor because of their fine clothing; and they persecute the meek and the poor in heart, because in their Alma 5:53; Morm. 8:36 (36–39).pride they are puffed up.

They wear Prov. 21:4. TG Stiffnecked.stiff necks and high heads; yea, and because of pride, and wickedness, and abominations, and TG Whore.whoredoms, they have all 2 Ne. 12:5; Mosiah 14:6; Alma 5:37.gone astray save it be a Morm. 8:36.few, who are the humble followers of Christ; nevertheless, they are 2 Pet. 3:17.led, that in many instances they do Matt. 22:29; 2 Ne. 27:35 (34–35); D&C 33:4.err because they are taught by the precepts of men.

O the Prov. 3:7 (5–7); 2 Ne. 15:21.wise, and the learned, and the rich, that are puffed up in the TG Pride.pride of their TG Hardheartedness.hearts, and all those who preach Matt. 5:19.false doctrines, and all those who commit Mosiah 11:2.whoredoms, and pervert the right way of the Lord, 3 Ne. 29:5 (4–7); Morm. 9:26.wo, wo, wo be unto them, saith the Lord God Almighty, for they shall be thrust down to hell!

Wo unto them that 2 Ne. 27:32.turn aside the just for a thing of naught and Mal. 2:17. TG Reviling.revile against that which is good, and say that it is of no worth! For the day shall come that the Lord God will speedily visit the inhabitants of the earth; and in that day that they are Ether 2:10 (8–11).fully ripe in iniquity they shall perish.
But behold, if the inhabitants of the earth shall repent of their wickedness and abominations they shall not be destroyed, saith the Lord of Hosts.
But behold, that great and TG Devil, Church of.abominable church, the Rev. 19:2.whore of all the earth, must 1 Ne. 14:3 (3, 17).tumble to the earth, and great must be the fall thereof.

For the kingdom of the devil must 1 Ne. 22:23 (22–23).shake, and they which belong to it must needs be stirred up unto repentance, or the Alma 34:35.devil will grasp them with his everlasting Mosiah 23:12; Alma 12:11. TG Chain.chains, and they be stirred up to anger, and perish;
For behold, at that day shall he Rev. 13:7; 2 Ne. 2:18; D&C 10:27; 76:29.rage in the Alma 8:9; D&C 10:20.hearts of the children of men, and stir them up to anger against that which is good.

And others will he Jacob 3:11; Alma 5:7 (6–7); Morm. 8:31.pacify, and lull them away into carnal TG Apathy.security, that they will say: All is well in Zion; yea, Zion prospereth, all is well—and thus the 2 Ne. 9:39; 32:8; Alma 30:42 (42, 53).devil Rev. 13:14 (11–18).cheateth their souls, and leadeth them away carefully down to hell.

And behold, others he TG Flatter.flattereth away, and telleth them there is no Mal. 2:17.hell; and he saith unto them: I am no devil, for there is none—and thus he whispereth in their ears, until he grasps them with his awful 2 Ne. 9:45; Alma 36:18. TG Bondage, Spiritual.chains, from whence there is no deliverance.

Yea, they are grasped with death, and hell; and death, and hell, and the devil, and all that have been seized therewith must stand before the throne of God, and be TG Jesus Christ, Judge.judged according to their works, from whence they must go into the place prepared for them, even a Rev. 19:20; 21:8; 2 Ne. 9:16 (8–19, 26); Jacob 6:10.lake of fire and brimstone, which is endless torment.
Therefore, wo be unto him that is at Amos 6:1.ease in Zion!
Wo be unto him that crieth: All is well!
Yea, wo be unto him that 2 Ne. 9:29.hearkeneth unto the precepts of men, and denieth the power of God, and the gift of the Holy Ghost!
Yea, wo be unto him that saith: We have received, and we Alma 12:10 (10–11); 3 Ne. 26:10 (9–10); Ether 4:8.need no more!

And in fine, wo unto all those who tremble, and are 2 Ne. 9:40; 33:5. TG Rebellion.angry because of Matt. 7:25.the truth of God! For behold, he that is built upon the TG Rock.rock TG Teachable.receiveth it with gladness; and he that is built upon a sandy foundation trembleth lest he shall fall.
Wo be unto him that shall say: We have received the word of God, and we 2 Ne. 29:10 (3–10).need 2 Ne. 27:14; Ether 4:8.no more of the word of God, for we have enough!

For behold, thus saith the Lord God: I will give unto the children of men line upon line, Prov. 2:9 (9–11); Isa. 28:13 (9–13); D&C 98:12.precept upon precept, here a little and there a little; and blessed are those who hearken unto my precepts, and lend an ear unto my counsel, for they shall learn Prov. 14:8. TG Wisdom.wisdom; for unto him that Luke 8:18.receiveth I will give Alma 12:10; D&C 50:24.more; and from them that shall say, We have enough, from them shall be taken away even that which they have.

Cursed is he that putteth his D&C 1:19 (19–20). TG Trust Not in the Arm of Flesh.trust in man, or maketh flesh his arm, or shall hearken unto the 2 Ne. 27:25.precepts of men, save their precepts shall be given by the power of the Holy Ghost.

1 Ne. 14:6; 3 Ne. 16:8.Wo be unto the Gentiles, saith the Lord God of Hosts! For notwithstanding I shall lengthen out mine arm unto them from day to day, they will deny me; nevertheless, I will be merciful unto them, saith the Lord God, if they will repent and TG God, Access to.come unto me; for mine 2 Ne. 19:17 (17–21); Jacob 5:47; 6:4; D&C 133:67.arm is lengthened out all the day long, saith the Lord God of Hosts.

div.p: Many Gentiles will reject the Book of Mormon—They will say, We need no more Bible—The Lord speaks to many nations—He will judge the world out of the books which will be written. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: But behold, there shall be many—at that day when I shall proceed to do a 2 Ne. 27:26. TG Restoration of the Gospel.marvelous work among them, that I may remember my TG Abrahamic Covenant.covenants which I have made unto the children of men, that I may set my hand again the 2 Ne. 6:14; 21:11; 25:17. TG Israel, Gathering of; Israel, Restoration of.second time to recover my people, which are of the house of Israel;

And also, that I may remember the promises which I have made unto thee, Nephi, and also unto thy father, that I would remember your seed; and that the 2 Ne. 3:21.words of your seed should proceed forth out of my mouth unto your seed; and my words shall Isa. 5:26; Moro. 10:28.hiss forth unto the 2 Ne. 15:26.ends of the earth, for a Ps. 60:4. TG Ensign.standard unto my people, which are of the house of Israel;
And because my words shall hiss forth—many of the Gentiles shall say: A 1 Ne. 13:24 (23–24). TG Bible; Book of Mormon.Bible! A Bible! We have got a Bible, and there cannot be any more Bible.

But thus saith the Lord God: O fools, they shall have a Rom. 3:2 (1–3).Bible; and it shall proceed forth from the Neh. 1:10; 1 Ne. 13:25 (23–25); D&C 3:16.Jews, mine ancient covenant people. And what TG Ingratitude; Thanksgiving.thank they the TG Israel, Judah, People of.Jews for the Bible which they receive from them? Yea, what do the Gentiles mean? Do they remember the travails, and the labors, and the pains of the Jews, and their diligence unto me, in bringing forth salvation unto the Gentiles?

O ye Gentiles, have ye remembered the Jews, mine ancient covenant people? Nay; but ye have Micah 6:16. TG Curse.cursed them, and have 3 Ne. 29:8. TG Hate.hated them, and have not sought to recover them. But behold, I will return all these things upon your own heads; for I the Lord have not forgotten my people.
Thou fool, that shall say: A 1 Ne. 13:23, 38.Bible, we have got a Bible, and we need no more Bible. Have ye obtained a Bible save it were by the Jews?

Know ye not that there are more TG Jesus Christ, Creator; Man, Physical Creation of; Nations.nations than one? Know ye not that I, the Lord your God, have created all men, and that I remember those who are upon the Isa. 51:5; 1 Ne. 22:4; 2 Ne. 10:8 (8, 20); D&C 133:8.isles of the sea; and that I rule in the heavens above and in the Deut. 10:14; 1 Ne. 11:6; D&C 55:1; Moses 6:44.earth beneath; and I bring forth my D&C 5:6.word unto the children of men, yea, even upon all the nations of the earth?

Wherefore murmur ye, because that ye shall receive more of my word? Know ye not that the TG Testimony.testimony of Ezek. 37:17 (15–20); 1 Ne. 13:39 (38–41); 2 Ne. 3:12; 33:10 (10–11).two nations is a Matt. 18:16.witness unto you that I am God, that I remember one 2 Sam. 7:23; Alma 9:20.nation like unto another? Wherefore, I speak the same words unto one nation like unto another. And when the two Hosea 1:11.nations shall run together the testimony of the two nations shall run together also.

And I do this that I may prove unto many that I am the Heb. 13:8.same yesterday, today, and forever; and that I speak forth my TG Word of God; Word of the Lord.words according to mine own pleasure. And because that I have spoken one TG Revelation.word ye need not suppose that I cannot speak another; for my Moses 1:4.work is not yet finished; neither shall it be until the end of man, neither from that time henceforth and forever.
Wherefore, because that ye have a Bible ye need not suppose that it contains all my TG Scriptures to Come Forth.words; neither 2 Ne. 28:29.need ye suppose that I have not caused more to be written.

For I command Alma 29:8.all men, both in the east and in the west, and in the north, and in the south, and in the islands of the sea, that they shall 2 Tim. 3:16; Moses 1:40. TG Scriptures, Preservation of; Scriptures, Writing of.write the words which I speak unto them; for out of the TG Book of Life.books which shall be written I will 2 Ne. 25:22 (18, 22); 33:14 (11, 14–15). TG Jesus Christ, Judge.judge the world, every man according to their works, according to that which is written.

For behold, I shall speak unto the 1 Ne. 13:23 (23–29); 2 Ne. 3:12.Jews and they shall TG Scriptures, Lost.write it; and I shall also speak unto the Nephites and they shall 1 Ne. 13:40 (39–42); 2 Ne. 26:17 (16–17); 27:6 (6–26).write it; and I shall also speak unto the other tribes of the house of Israel, which I have led away, and they shall write it; and I shall also speak unto 2 Ne. 26:33; Alma 29:8.all nations of the earth and they shall write it.

And it shall come to pass that the Morm. 5:14 (13–14).Jews shall have the words of the Nephites, and the Nephites shall have the words of the Jews; and the Nephites and the Jews shall have the words of the TG Israel, Ten Lost Tribes of.lost tribes of Israel; and the lost tribes of Israel shall have the words of the Nephites and the Jews.

And it shall come to pass that my people, which are of the Jer. 3:18 (17–19).house of Israel, shall be gathered home unto the TG Israel, Gathering of; Lands of Inheritance.lands of their possessions; and my word also shall be gathered in Ezek. 37:17 (16–17).one. And I will show unto them that fight against my word and against my 1 Kgs. 8:51; 2 Ne. 3:9; 8:16.people, who are of the 1 Ne. 22:9; 2 Ne. 30:7 (7–8).house of Israel, that I am God, and that I Gen. 12:2 (1–3); 1 Ne. 17:40; 3 Ne. 20:27; Abr. 2:9. TG Abrahamic Covenant.covenanted with Micah 7:20 (18–20).Abraham that I would remember his Ps. 102:28; D&C 132:30; Moses 7:52 (50–53). TG Seed of Abraham.seed Gen. 17:7 (5–7).forever.

div.p: Converted Gentiles will be numbered with the covenant people—Many Lamanites and Jews will believe the word and become delightsome—Israel will be restored and the wicked destroyed. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: And now behold, my beloved brethren, I would speak unto you; for I, Nephi, would not suffer that ye should suppose that ye are more righteous than the Gentiles shall be. For behold, except ye shall keep the commandments of God ye shall all likewise Luke 13:3 (1–5).perish; and because of the words which have been spoken ye need not suppose that the Gentiles are utterly destroyed.

For behold, I say unto you that as many of the Gentiles as will repent are the Gal. 3:29 (26–29); Abr. 2:10 (9–11).covenant people of the Lord; and as many of the Matt. 8:12. TG Israel, Judah, People of.Jews as will not repent shall be Luke 3:9 (3–9); Rom. 9:6; Jacob 5:6.cast off; for the Lord Rom. 3:29.covenanteth with none save it be with them that TG Repent.repent and believe in his Son, who is the Holy One of Israel.

And now, I would prophesy somewhat more concerning the Jews and the Gentiles. For after the book of which I have spoken shall come forth, and be written unto the Gentiles, and sealed up again unto the Lord, there shall be many which shall 2 Ne. 28:2; 3 Ne. 16:6 (6–13).believe the words which are written; and 1 Ne. 22:9 (5–10); 3 Ne. 5:25 (20–26).they shall carry them forth unto the 2 Ne. 4:7 (7–11); Jacob 1:5. TG Israel, Remnant of.remnant of our seed.
And then shall the remnant of our seed know concerning us, how that we came out from Jerusalem, and that they are descendants of the Jews.

And the gospel of Jesus Christ shall be declared among 3 Ne. 21:5 (3–7, 24–26); Morm. 5:15.them; wherefore, D&C 3:20.they shall be restored unto the 1 Ne. 15:14; 2 Ne. 3:12; Morm. 7:9 (1, 9–10).knowledge of their fathers, and also to the knowledge of Jesus Christ, which was had among their fathers.

And then shall they rejoice; for they shall Alma 3:14.know that it is a blessing unto them from the hand of God; and their TG Darkness, Spiritual; Spiritual Blindness.scales of darkness shall begin to fall from their eyes; and many generations shall not pass away among them, save they shall be a pure and a W of M 1:8; D&C 49:24; 109:65.delightsome people.

And it shall come to pass that the 2 Ne. 29:14 (13–14); 3 Ne. 5:25 (23–26). TG Israel, Judah, People of.Jews which are scattered also shall 2 Ne. 25:16 (16–17).begin to believe in Christ; and they shall begin to gather in upon the face of the land; and as many as shall believe in Christ shall also become a delightsome people.

And it shall come to pass that the Lord God shall commence his work among all nations, kindreds, tongues, and people, to bring about the TG Israel, Restoration of; Millennium, Preparing a People for.restoration of his people upon the earth.

And with righteousness shall the Isa. 11:4 (4–9).Lord God Ps. 19:9; 2 Ne. 9:15.judge the poor, and reprove with equity for the TG Meek.meek of the earth. And he shall smite the earth with the rod of his mouth; and with the breath of his lips shall he slay the wicked.

For the Jacob 5:29; 6:2. TG Last Days.time speedily cometh that the Lord God shall cause a great D&C 63:54.division among the people, and the wicked will he Ps. 73:17 (3–17); D&C 29:17; JS—M 1:55.destroy; and he will 1 Ne. 22:17 (15–22); 3 Ne. 22:13 (13–17); Moses 7:61.spare his people, yea, even if it so be that he must 1 Ne. 22:23 (15–17, 23); Jacob 5:69. TG Earth, Cleansing of.destroy the wicked by fire.
And Isa. 11:5 (5–9). TG Righteousness.righteousness shall be the girdle of his loins, and faithfulness the girdle of his reins.

Isa. 65:25. TG Earth, Renewal of.And then shall the wolf dwell with the lamb; and the leopard shall lie down with the kid, and the calf, and the young lion, and the fatling, together; and a little child shall lead them.
And the cow and the bear shall feed; their young ones shall lie down together; and the lion shall eat straw like the ox.
And the sucking child shall play on the hole of the asp, and the weaned child shall put his hand on the cockatrice’s den.
They shall not hurt nor destroy in all my holy Joel 2:1.mountain; for the earth shall be full of the TG God, Knowledge about.knowledge of the Lord as the waters cover the sea.
Wherefore, the things of D&C 101:32 (32–35); 121:28 (26–32).all nations shall be made known; yea, all things shall be made Ether 4:7 (6–7, 13–17).known unto the children of men.

There is nothing which is secret save it shall be Luke 12:2 (2–3); D&C 1:3 (1–3).revealed; there is no work of darkness save it shall be made manifest in the light; and there is nothing which is sealed upon the earth save it shall be loosed.

Wherefore, all things which have been revealed unto the children of men shall at that Acts 3:21.day be revealed; and Satan shall have power over the hearts of the children of men Rev. 20:2 (2–3); Ether 8:26.no more, for a long time. And now, my beloved brethren, I make an end of my sayings.

div.p: Nephi tells why Christ was baptized—Men must follow Christ, be baptized, receive the Holy Ghost, and endure to the end to be saved—Repentance and baptism are the gate to the strait and narrow path—Eternal life comes to those who keep the commandments after baptism. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: And now I, Nephi, make an end of my 2 Ne. 25:4 (1–4).prophesying unto you, my beloved brethren. And I cannot write but a few things, which I know must surely come to pass; neither can I write but a few of the 2 Ne. 11:1.words of my brother Jacob.

Wherefore, the things which I have written sufficeth me, save it be a few words which I 2 Ne. 11:4 (4–6).must speak concerning the doctrine of Christ; wherefore, I shall speak unto you plainly, according to the plainness of my prophesying.

For my soul delighteth in 2 Ne. 25:7 (7–8); 32:7.plainness; for after this manner doth the Lord God work among the children of men. For the Lord God giveth light unto the TG Understanding.understanding; for he speaketh unto men according to their D&C 1:24. TG Language.language, unto their understanding.

Wherefore, I would that ye should remember that I have spoken unto you concerning that 1 Ne. 10:7; 11:27.prophet which the Lord showed unto me, that should baptize the TG Jesus Christ, Lamb of God.Lamb of God, which should take away the sins of the world.

And now, if the Lamb of God, he being 1 Jn. 3:3.holy, should have need to be Matt. 3:11 (11–17). TG Jesus Christ, Baptism of.baptized by water, to fulfil all righteousness, O then, how much more need have we, being unholy, to be TG Baptism, Essential.baptized, yea, even by water!
And now, I would ask of you, my beloved brethren, wherein the Lamb of God did fulfil all righteousness in being baptized by water?

Know ye not that he was holy? But notwithstanding he being holy, he showeth unto the children of men that, according to the flesh he humbleth himself before the Father, and witnesseth unto the Father that he would be John 5:30. TG Obedience.obedient unto him in keeping his commandments.
Wherefore, after he was baptized with water the Holy Ghost descended upon him in the 1 Ne. 11:27.form of a TG Holy Ghost, Dove, Sign of.dove.

And again, it showeth unto the children of men the straitness of the path, and the narrowness of the 2 Ne. 9:41; 3 Ne. 14:14 (13–14); D&C 22:4; 43:7.gate, by which they should enter, he having set the TG Example.example before them.

And he said unto the children of men: Matt. 4:19; 8:22; 9:9.Follow thou me. Wherefore, my beloved brethren, can we Matt. 8:19; Moro. 7:11; D&C 56:2.follow Jesus save we shall be willing to keep the commandments of the Father?
And the Father said: Repent ye, repent ye, and be baptized in the name of my Beloved Son.

And also, the voice of the Son came unto me, saying: He that is baptized in my name, to him will the Father TG Holy Ghost, Gift of.give the Holy Ghost, like unto me; wherefore, Matt. 16:24 (24–26); Luke 9:59 (57–62); John 12:26; 1 Jn. 2:6. TG God, the Standard of Righteousness.follow me, and do the things which ye have seen me do.

Wherefore, my beloved brethren, I know that if ye shall TG Jesus Christ, Exemplar.follow the Son, with full purpose of heart, acting no TG Hypocrisy.hypocrisy and no deception before God, but with real TG Integrity; Sincere.intent, repenting of your sins, witnessing unto the Father that ye are TG Agency; Commitment.willing to take upon you the TG Jesus Christ, Taking the Name of.name of Christ, by Gal. 3:27 (26–27).baptism—yea, by following your Lord and your Savior down into the water, according to his word, behold, then shall ye receive the Holy Ghost; yea, then cometh the TG Holy Ghost, Baptism of.baptism of fire and of the Holy Ghost; and then can ye speak with the 2 Ne. 32:2 (2–3). TG Holy Ghost, Gifts of.tongue of angels, and shout praises unto the Holy One of Israel.

But, behold, my beloved brethren, thus came the voice of the Son unto me, saying: After ye have repented of your sins, and witnessed unto the Father that ye are willing to keep my commandments, by the baptism of water, and have received the baptism of fire and of the Holy Ghost, and can speak with a new tongue, yea, even with the tongue of angels, and after this should Matt. 10:33 (32–33); Rom. 1:16 (15–18); 2 Tim. 2:12 (10–15); Alma 24:30; D&C 101:5 (1–5). TG Holy Ghost, Unpardonable Sin against.deny me, it would have been Heb. 6:4 (4–6); 2 Pet. 2:21.better for you that ye had not known me.

And I heard a voice from the Father, saying: Yea, the D&C 64:31; 66:11.words of my Beloved are true and faithful. He that Jacob 6:11 (7–11). TG Endure; Steadfastness.endureth to the Alma 5:13.end, the same shall be saved.

And now, my beloved brethren, I know by this that unless a man shall Mark 13:13; Alma 38:2; D&C 20:29; 53:7.endure to the end, in following the TG Example; Jesus Christ, Exemplar.example of the Son of the living God, he cannot be saved.

Wherefore, do the things which I have told you I have seen that your Lord and your Redeemer should do; for, for this cause have they been shown unto me, that ye might know the gate by which ye should enter. For the gate by which ye should enter is repentance and Mosiah 18:10. TG Baptism.baptism by water; and then cometh a TG Holy Ghost, Mission of; Remission of Sins.remission of your sins by fire and by the Holy Ghost.

And then are ye in this 1 Ne. 8:20.strait and narrow Prov. 4:18. TG Gate; Path; Way.path which leads to eternal life; yea, ye have entered in by the gate; ye have done according to the commandments of the Father and the Son; and ye have received the Holy Ghost, which TG Holy Ghost, Mission of; Holy Ghost, Source of Testimony.witnesses of the 3 Ne. 28:11; Moses 6:66.Father and the Son, unto the fulfilling of the promise which he hath made, that if ye entered in by the way ye should receive.

And now, my beloved brethren, after ye have gotten into this strait and narrow Hosea 14:9 (8–9).path, I would ask if all is Mosiah 4:10.done? Behold, I say unto you, Nay; for ye have not come thus far save it were by the word of Christ with unshaken TG Faith.faith in him, Moro. 6:4; D&C 3:20; Moses 7:53.relying wholly upon the merits of him who is mighty to TG Jesus Christ, Atonement through.save.

Wherefore, ye must press forward with a TG Commitment; Dedication; Perseverance; Steadfastness; Walking with God.steadfastness in Christ, having a perfect brightness of TG Hope.hope, and a TG God, Love of; Love.love of God and of all men. Wherefore, if ye shall press forward, feasting upon the word of Christ, and James 5:8 (7–11); Rev. 2:25 (25–26); 3 Ne. 15:9.endure to the end, behold, thus saith the Father: Ye shall have 1 Jn. 2:25; 5:13 (10–21). TG Objectives.eternal life.

And now, behold, my beloved brethren, this is the Ex. 33:13 (12–13); Acts 4:12; 2 Ne. 9:41; Alma 37:46; D&C 132:22 (22, 25).way; and there is 2 Ne. 25:20; Mosiah 3:17.none other way nor TG Jesus Christ, Taking the Name of.name given under heaven whereby man can be saved in the kingdom of God. And now, behold, this is the Matt. 7:28; John 7:16.doctrine of Christ, and the only and true doctrine of the TG Godhead.Father, and of the Son, and of the Holy Ghost, which is Deut. 6:4; Gal. 3:20; 1 Ne. 13:41; 3 Ne. 28:10; Morm. 7:7. TG Unity.one God, without end. Amen.

div.p: Angels speak by the power of the Holy Ghost—Men must pray and gain knowledge for themselves from the Holy Ghost. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: And now, behold, my beloved brethren, I suppose that ye ponder somewhat in your hearts concerning that which ye should do after ye have entered in by the way. But, behold, why do ye ponder these things in your hearts?

Do ye not remember that I said unto you that after ye had Alma 36:24; 3 Ne. 9:20.received the Holy Ghost ye could speak with the 2 Ne. 31:13.tongue of angels? And now, how could ye speak with the tongue of angels save it were by the Holy Ghost?

TG Angels.Angels speak by the power of the Holy Ghost; wherefore, they speak the words of Christ. Wherefore, I said unto you, Jer. 15:16. TG Bread of Life; Study.feast upon the Col. 3:16.words of Christ; for behold, the words of Christ will Ex. 4:15. TG Problem-Solving.tell you all things what ye should do.

Wherefore, now after I have spoken these words, if ye cannot understand them it will be because ye TG Ask.ask not, neither do ye knock; wherefore, ye are not brought into the light, but must perish in the dark.

For behold, again I say unto you that if ye will enter in by the way, and receive the Holy Ghost, it will 3 Ne. 16:6; Ether 4:11 (11–12); D&C 28:15; Moses 8:24. TG Holy Ghost, Gifts of; Revelation.show unto you all things what ye should do.

Behold, this is the doctrine of Christ, and there will be no more doctrine given until after he shall 1 Ne. 12:6.manifest himself unto you in the flesh. And when he shall manifest himself unto you in the flesh, the things which he shall say unto you shall ye observe to do.

And now I, Nephi, cannot say more; the Spirit stoppeth mine utterance, and I am left to mourn because of the TG Doubt; Unbelief.unbelief, and the wickedness, and the ignorance, and the TG Stiffnecked.stiffneckedness of men; for they will 2 Pet. 3:5.not search TG Knowledge.knowledge, nor understand great knowledge, when it is given unto them in 2 Ne. 25:7 (7–8); 31:3; Jacob 4:13; Alma 13:23; Ether 12:39.plainness, even as plain as word can be.

And now, my beloved brethren, I perceive that ye ponder still in your hearts; and it grieveth me that I must speak concerning this thing. For if ye would hearken unto the TG Discernment, Spiritual.Spirit which teacheth a man to TG Prayer.pray, ye would know that ye must Jacob 3:1.pray; for the 2 Ne. 9:39; 28:21 (20–22); Mosiah 2:32; 4:14; Alma 30:42 (42, 53). TG Spirits, Evil or Unclean.evil spirit teacheth not a man to pray, but teacheth him that he must not pray.

But behold, I say unto you that ye must Mosiah 26:39; 3 Ne. 20:1; D&C 75:11.pray always, and not faint; that ye must not perform any thing unto the Lord save in the first place ye shall 3 Ne. 18:19.pray unto the Father in the Col. 3:17; Moses 5:8.name of Christ, that he will Micah 4:13; 2 Ne. 2:2.consecrate thy performance unto thee, that thy performance may be for the Alma 34:27.welfare of thy soul.

div.p: Nephi’s words are true—They testify of Christ—Those who believe in Christ will believe Nephi’s words, which will stand as a witness before the judgment bar. About 559–545 B.C.

chapter.verse: And now I, Nephi, cannot write all the things which were taught among my people; neither am I Ether 12:23 (23–27).mighty in writing, like unto speaking; for when a man Rom. 10:17 (13–17); D&C 100:8 (7–8). TG Holy Ghost, Gifts of.speaketh by the power of the Holy Ghost the power of the Holy Ghost carrieth it unto the hearts of the children of men.

But behold, there are many that Num. 15:31 (30–31); 1 Ne. 19:7; Jacob 4:14; D&C 3:7 (4–13).
